title: Run gofmt and lint just for one Go version
body:
Also, "make docs" is part of "make all" so the step was being repeated.

This PR was created for a comment that @rhatdna made here: https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1412#issuecomment-370239969

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
LGTM. Just travis changes, so need need to run the papr tests.

All tests are green, merging
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit fb66218 has been approved by `mheon`
